patch.value: Track end-to-end rollout for opt-out telemetry, remote ingestion, observability stack, backups, and verification.
Ship GDPR-aligned pm CLI telemetry plus self-hosted analytics and observability stack on the Ubuntu host.
Telemetry stack is deployed and verified end-to-end with consent controls, retention, backups, and docs.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'telemetry observability gdpr' --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20; pm search 'telemetry' --mode keyword --limit 20; pm list-open --tag telemetry --limit 20. Net-new scope because no active telemetry rollout lineage existed.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Tracker hygiene follow-up completed: created and closed pm-35wb to backfill missing docs/TELEMETRY.md and docs/operations/REMOTE_TELEMETRY_STACK.md references from telemetry rollout lineage. Post-fix validate and health checks are clean.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Remote telemetry verification 2026-04-26: health endpoint https://pm-cli.unbrained.dev/healthz returned ok true queue pm.telemetry.events; synthetic POST to /v1/events accepted one event with schema_version 1; Grafana endpoint https://pm.unbrained.dev returned authenticated login redirect. Remaining gap observed in local CLI: pm health output does not include telemetry runtime/export status despite operations guidance expecting telemetry visibility.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Phase 4b-c remote verification completed on 2026-04-26: stack services healthy, telemetry API/Grafana reachable, Prometheus ingest and Tempo span signals present, Postgres telemetry tables populated, and synthetic UUID event persisted (command=remote-audit-smoke). Added/updated child findings: pm-vhdc (UUID ingestion validation backlog), pm-300m (pm health telemetry diagnostics gap), pm-r9ei (Grafana queue panel selector mismatch).

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: 2026-04-26 audit confirms: Remote telemetry stack fully operational. All 9 containers healthy. 11,414+ events in Postgres. Grafana v11.6.14 accessible. Alloy forwarding Docker logs to Loki and OTLP traces to Tempo. Telemetry API accepts events (HTTP 200). Outstanding gaps: capture_level not enforced, retention_days not enforced, no pm health telemetry check.

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Telemetry pipeline fully operational: 9 Docker containers, E2E event flow, Grafana+Alloy+Loki+Tempo+Prometheus+RabbitMQ+Postgres verified 2026-04-26

value.note: telemetry backlog wave baseline and remote diagnostics

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Telemetry backlog wave 2026-04-27 completed: closed child issues pm-vhdc (UUID boundary validation + worker poison-drain remediation), pm-r9ei (Grafana queue panel query alignment to exporter label model), and pm-pxx0 (local retention_days queue pruning). Evidence artifacts are linked under scripts/prod/telemetry (baseline + per-item execution logs). Final verification includes remote healthz ok, queue depth 0/0, PromQL queue vectors non-empty for patched expressions, and local telemetry/health unit suites passing (34 tests).

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Close-readiness validate check (resolution + history drift) was run for this wave; history drift is clean and remaining resolution warnings are limited to unrelated historical closed items outside this telemetry lineage.
